name: ev4-decision-kernel

scripts.validate:mvk: node kernel/validator/validate-mvk.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-decision-record-v2.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-source-cards.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-consumption-boundaries.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-evidence-workspace.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-elementor-doc-coverage.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-decision-governance-foundation.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-resolver-contract.mjs && node kernel/resolver-mvp/resolve-high-risk-p0.mjs && node kernel/validator/validate-l2-decision-correctness.mjs

description: Kernel-local MVK schema, fixture, source-card, consumption-boundary, evidence-workspace, Elementor V4 doc coverage, decision-governance foundation, behavioral coverage, roadmap-memory, Decision Record v2, Resolver Contract, limited KROAD-006 Resolver MVP, and KROAD-007 L2 Decision Correctness validator package.
